description: The LegacyLabel component is a leftover Component from content migrated from other platforms. It should not be used, and should be replaced whenever possible.

fields.TextRenderer: The text renderer for the label visual.
fields.BaseColor: The base color of the label visual.
fields.BaseColorElement: The UI element for the base color.
fields.Brightness: The brightness of the label visual.
fields.LerpRatio: A value from 01 to lerp ``BaseColor`` and ``LerpColor`` with.
fields._textColor: The field to drive with a color between ``BaseColor`` and ``LerpColor`` using ``LerpRatio`` as the specifier for the in between color.

usage: Not to be used by the user, legacy content.
